mapper.select: SELECT rr.*, b.bed_no, r.room_no, r.floor_id, f.floor_name, r.building_id, eb.building_name FROM elder_room_reserve rr LEFT JOIN elder_bed b ON rr.bed_id = b.id LEFT JOIN elder_room r on r.id = rr.room_id LEFT JOIN elder_floor f on f.id = r.floor_id LEFT JOIN elder_building eb on eb.id = r.building_id WHERE rr.del_flag = 0 and rr.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC limit 1
